name: Cherry Blossom Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine egg substitute, orange juice, sugar, and oil.
2. Add the baking mix; stir for 30 seconds.
3. Fold in the chopped pecans.
4. Coat muffin cups with nonstick spray or use paper liners; fill cups one-third full.
5. Top each with 2 teaspoons of fruit spread.
6. Cover with remaining batter.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until muffins test done.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing to a wire rack.
Yield: 9 muffins
Diabetic Exchange: One muffin equals 2 starch, 2 fat. Also, 241 calories, 330 mg sodium, trace cholesterol, 36 gm carbohydrate, 4 gm protein, and 10 gm fat.
